modules.doc: Executable backend smoke helpers.
Local backend health checks for optional service integrations.
Small executable backend manual for keyword-first smoke checks.
Dependency-free graph extraction for chunk enrichment.
Dependency-free evaluation trace storage and metrics for Milestone 5.
Dependency-free feedback capture for early Milestone 1.
Dependency-free ingestion behavior for early Milestone 1.
Dependency-free planner baseline for routing retrieval requests.
Dependency-optional orchestration runtime boundary.
Dependency-free evidence reranking for early Milestone 1.
Retrieval execution partition.
Retrieval execution helpers for keyword/vector evidence lookup.
Dependency-free vector and sparse indexing for early Milestone 1.
Shared contracts for cross-partition records.
Lightweight shared contracts used across retrieval-center partitions.
Environment profile defaults for local, test, staging, and production.
Shared fixture catalog helpers for deterministic source tests.
Shared logging and error policy defaults for Milestone 0.
Lightweight shared data records for Milestone 0 and early Milestone 1.
Declarative stack selections for the initial retrieval-center baseline.
Source registry partition.
In-memory source registry behavior for Milestone 1.
Dependency-free in-memory storage behavior for early Milestone 1.
Dependency-free backend adapter contracts for external storage integration.
Dependency-free JSON/JSONL persistence for the storage baseline.
Neo4j-compatible graph backend adapter.
Qdrant-compatible vector backend adapter.
Executable dependency-free vector backend adapter.
Dependency-free cited synthesis for early Milestone 1.
Dependency-free validator behavior for evidence and claim support.

classes.name: GraphExtractionResult

classes.name: RankingWeights

classes.name: HybridSearchResult

classes.name: GraphTraversalResult

classes.purpose: Updated chunks plus the underlying storage commit result.

classes.name: InMemoryKeywordIndex

classes.name: FixtureCatalogError

classes.name: LogExpectation

classes.name: SourceRegistryError
classes.purpose: Raised when source registry input cannot be represented safely.

classes.name: SourceAccessResult

classes.name: SourcePolicyDecision

classes.name: SourceRefreshCheck
classes.purpose: Operational freshness check for source refresh monitoring.

classes.name: InMemorySourceRepository
classes.purpose: Tiny in-memory repository suitable for unit tests and local smoke checks.

classes.name: SourceRegistry

classes.name: StorageOperationError

classes.purpose: Outcome of a retryable bundle commit with rollback-on-failure handling.

classes.name: InMemoryStorageRepository
classes.purpose: Small metadata/raw store used before durable storage exists.

classes.name: BackendHealthCheck

classes.name: BackendOperationResult

classes.name: BackendRuntimeAdapter
classes.purpose: Executable adapter boundary used before service-specific clients exist.

classes.name: BackendAdapterRegistry
classes.purpose: Small registry for adapter manifests and deterministic selection.

classes.name: DurableStorageError
classes.purpose: Raised when durable storage cannot read or write its local files.

classes.purpose: Executable local durable adapter used as the first backend runtime.

generalization_opportunities.title: Shared dataclass serialization/id helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Many record/config dataclasses repeat to_dict wrappers around shared serialization, and id factories repeat UUID/hash conventions.
missing_tests: Parametrized serialization test for all shared dataclasses and enum/date/list/dict cases.

generalization_opportunities.title: Generic in-memory repository primitives
generalization_opportunities.summary: Source and ingestion repositories repeat save/get/id-keyed dictionary patterns, with related log/error append behavior.
missing_tests: Repository contract tests for unknown ids, insertion order, seeded records, and relation append behavior.

generalization_opportunities.title: Partition outcome/event builders
generalization_opportunities.summary: Registry, ingestion, and enrichment hand-build partition-specific logs/errors/results around the same correlation, partition, operation, event, detail, fallback fields.
missing_tests: Cross-partition golden telemetry tests for event_name, fallback_action, retry_count, output_reference, and severity.

generalization_opportunities.title: Enum coercion and lookup helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Several modules accept enum-or-string inputs and manually coerce/lookup values with inconsistent error wrapping.
missing_tests: Negative tests for invalid environment/stack/source enum strings and consistent domain errors.

generalization_opportunities.title: Deterministic stable-id helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Chunk and graph ids use related SHA-256 deterministic id patterns that should share one contract.
missing_tests: Shared stable-id tests for prefix format, separator handling, truncation, and repeatability.

generalization_opportunities.title: Content normalizer strategy registry
generalization_opportunities.summary: normalize_document dispatches JSON/CSV/HTML/default branches with similar return shapes; new formats will expand conditionals.
missing_tests: Table-driven normalization tests by content_type, title, type, metadata, flags, and failure behavior.

generalization_opportunities.title: Freshness and date parsing utilities
generalization_opportunities.summary: Refresh interval parsing, first-date extraction, and as_of_date fallback are separate but part of one freshness policy surface.
missing_tests: Focused duration parsing, default refresh intervals, stale transitions, and freshness fallback-order tests.

generalization_opportunities.title: Quality flag append/dedup helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Ingestion and enrichment both carry/append quality flags with deduplication concerns.
missing_tests: Tests for preserving existing flags, avoiding duplicates, ordering, and combining ingestion plus graph flags.

generalization_opportunities.title: Backend runtime adapter template
generalization_opportunities.summary: Adapters repeat capability checks, health status selection, unavailable handling, operation result construction, and storage error creation.
missing_tests: Common adapter template parity tests across durable/vector/Qdrant/Neo4j.

generalization_opportunities.title: Record save/snapshot table
generalization_opportunities.summary: InMemory save_* and Durable save_* follow id-field/store/write patterns suitable for a table-driven record registry.
missing_tests: Generic save/snapshot table tests preserving id/store mappings for every record type.

generalization_opportunities.title: Generic index commit pipeline
generalization_opportunities.summary: commit_vectors and commit_sparse_index share generation, skip tracking, repository storage, chunk pointer updates, logs, and result assembly.
missing_tests: Shared index commit tests proving identical logs/results for vector and sparse modes.

generalization_opportunities.title: Candidate hydration contract
generalization_opportunities.summary: Vector, keyword, graph, Qdrant, and Neo4j flows produce overlapping candidate payloads through separate mapping logic.
missing_tests: Unified hydration tests for local index, graph, Qdrant, and Neo4j payloads.

generalization_opportunities.title: Central access metadata policy
generalization_opportunities.summary: Access metadata is checked and serialized in storage verification, retrieval filtering, chunk payloads, and backend hits.
missing_tests: Central access evaluator tests preserving source/document/chunk denial precedence.

generalization_opportunities.title: Graph index abstraction
generalization_opportunities.summary: Graph commit, rebuild, verification, and traversal manipulate relation/entity/chunk reverse indexes directly.
missing_tests: Graph index abstraction tests for rebuild, verify, traversal, and durable reload equivalence.

generalization_opportunities.title: Text normalization and term extraction surface
generalization_opportunities.summary: Alias/query normalization and term extraction are split across indexing, retrieval, and graph adapter code.
missing_tests: Shared normalization parity tests across keyword, vector, and graph lookup paths.

generalization_opportunities.title: Optional client boundary standardization
generalization_opportunities.summary: Qdrant and Neo4j adapters repeat optional dependency/client handling, fake-client-compatible calls, exception wrapping, and payload conversion.
missing_tests: Optional-client ready/degraded/unavailable tests using deterministic fake clients.

generalization_opportunities.title: Shared evidence quality/scoring utilities
generalization_opportunities.summary: Tokenization, clamping, reliability scoring, retrieval-score selection, and freshness scoring are implemented separately with different stopword/weight details.
missing_tests: Shared scoring utility parity tests across ranking/validation/synthesis.

generalization_opportunities.title: Central evidence approval/citation policy
generalization_opportunities.summary: Validation _is_usable and synthesis _is_approved encode overlapping access/text/evidence/citation rules.
missing_tests: Citation policy parity tests between validation approval and synthesis usage.

generalization_opportunities.title: Shared telemetry and repository hook adapter
generalization_opportunities.summary: Planning, ranking, validation, synthesis, and orchestration all construct telemetry and optional repository persistence locally.
missing_tests: Common repository hook tests with absent and partial repository implementations.

generalization_opportunities.title: Unified date/freshness extraction
generalization_opportunities.summary: Ranking, validation, and synthesis derive evidence dates/staleness differently, with validation also consulting repository chunks/documents.
missing_tests: Date resolver tests for evidence, chunk, document, retrieved_at, and missing-date fallback order.

generalization_opportunities.title: Claim lifecycle service boundary
generalization_opportunities.summary: Synthesis creates claims, validation checks support, and planning mutates claims after validation.
missing_tests: Claim lifecycle tests for creation, citation attach, validation update, and final answer replacement.

generalization_opportunities.title: Table-driven planning policy
generalization_opportunities.summary: Query type to retrieval modes, budgets, fallback actions, validations, and plan reasons are spread across conditionals.
missing_tests: Graph, multi-hop, budget override, and repair-loop table cases.

generalization_opportunities.title: Runtime result serialization pattern
generalization_opportunities.summary: PlannerTrace and orchestration runtime records manually serialize enum-rich dataclasses.
missing_tests: PlannerTrace and orchestration DTO to_dict golden serialization tests.

generalization_opportunities.title: Shared trace/reference extraction
generalization_opportunities.summary: Feedback and evaluation duplicate evidence/source/document/chunk/citation/claim/validation id collection and unique helpers.
missing_tests: Provenance extraction parity tests between feedback and evaluation traces.

generalization_opportunities.title: Repository duck-typed persistence wrappers
generalization_opportunities.summary: Feedback and evaluation each define hasattr-based optional save/log/error wrappers.
missing_tests: Generic repository-save helper behavior with absent and partially implemented methods.

generalization_opportunities.title: Operation telemetry construction helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Feedback/evaluation operations repeat success/error logs, retryable storage envelopes, and policy_mutation=false details.
missing_tests: Operation helper golden tests for feedback/evaluation event payloads.

generalization_opportunities.title: Shared metrics aggregation utilities
generalization_opportunities.summary: Evaluation contains generic sum/average/rate/count helpers useful for broader observability dashboards.
missing_tests: Aggregation helper tests for empty, partial, and non-scalar metrics.

generalization_opportunities.title: Backend health service descriptors
generalization_opportunities.summary: Health CLI parses env files manually and repeats Qdrant/Neo4j strict-service blocked/health/status logic.
missing_tests: Env parsing edge cases and mocked ready/degraded/unavailable service descriptor tests.

generalization_opportunities.title: PowerShell script common helper
generalization_opportunities.summary: Setup and test scripts duplicate root/env resolution and command wiring.
missing_tests: Executable script behavior tests beyond string-presence checks.

generalization_opportunities.title: Failure taxonomy metadata table
generalization_opportunities.summary: Feedback category classification, task title, task action, and priority hints encode parallel category mappings.
missing_tests: Table-driven tests for every FailureCategory text signal, validation signal, title/action, and priority.

summary_findings.theme: Shared telemetry, error, and repository-hook contracts
summary_findings.why: Most partitions hand-build logs/errors/results and optional persistence wrappers, creating drift risk in event names, fallback actions, retryability, and repository behavior.
Retrieval, validation, synthesis, feedback, and evaluation each map or filter evidence provenance; one shared provenance/access contract would reduce leakage and citation drift risk.
Many dataclasses manually expose to_dict and enum/date/list serialization; a common pattern would stabilize API/export contracts.
In-memory and durable stores repeat save/get/snapshot/index routines; generalizing record registry primitives would make MARACA v02 easier to extend.
Ranking, validation, synthesis, retrieval, ingestion, and registry all maintain related text/date/scoring helpers with inconsistent details.
Routing, normalizers, enum coercion, service health checks, and failure taxonomy are currently encoded through conditionals/literals that should become explicit policy tables.

summary_findings.theme: Index, adapter, and service boundary templates
summary_findings.why: Vector/sparse commits and external adapters repeat pipeline and service-boundary patterns that should be templated before more backends are added.

items.title: Confirm Evidence-Only Scope
items.phase: Phase 0 - Review Gates and Evidence Lock
acceptance_criteria: Every v02 task maps to at least one evidence id from `generalize_project.json`.
No new task is added without JSON evidence.
Reviewers agree that this tracker is a planning artifact, not an implementation change.
test_plan: Check each tracker item against `agent_reviews.generalization_opportunities` or `summary_findings`.
Confirm all affected modules are present in the JSON module inventory.
risks: JSON evidence is draft and may miss runtime behavior outside AST-visible code.

items.title: Prioritize Summary Findings
items.phase: Phase 0 - Review Gates and Evidence Lock
acceptance_criteria: Work is sequenced in rank order unless a dependency requires earlier foundational work.
Rank 1 and rank 2 receive architecture review before broad refactors.
test_plan: Use existing test areas listed in agent reviews as regression anchors.
risks: Over-generalization could obscure currently simple dependency-free flows.

items.title: Shared Dataclass Serialization and DTO Export
items.phase: Phase 1 - Shared Foundation Contracts
items.task: Define one json-ready serialization pattern for dataclasses, enum-rich DTOs, date/list/dict fields, planner traces, and orchestration runtime records. Preserve existing `to_dict` contract shape while reducing manual serializer drift.
acceptance_criteria: Shared records/configs and planner/orchestration DTOs serialize through the common pattern.
Enum/date/list/dict serialization remains stable.
Existing public `to_dict` methods continue to return JSON-ready dictionaries.
test_plan: Parametrized serialization test for all shared dataclasses and enum/date/list/dict cases.
PlannerTrace and orchestration DTO `to_dict` golden serialization tests.
risks: Golden outputs may reveal current inconsistent serialization that reviewers must intentionally preserve or normalize.

items.title: Enum Coercion and Lookup Helper
items.phase: Phase 1 - Shared Foundation Contracts
items.task: Generalize enum-or-string input coercion and lookup behavior with consistent error wrapping.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid environment, stack, source, and ingestion enum strings fail consistently.
Existing accepted string and enum inputs continue to work.
test_plan: Negative tests for invalid environment/stack/source enum strings and consistent domain errors.
Positive table tests for valid string and enum inputs.
dependencies: P1.1 can share serialization/error conventions, but this task may run independently after P0
risks: Error message changes could affect tests or manual smoke expectations.

items.title: Deterministic Stable-ID Helper
items.phase: Phase 1 - Shared Foundation Contracts
items.task: Centralize SHA-256 deterministic id patterns for chunks, entities, relations, prefixes, separators, truncation, and repeatability.
acceptance_criteria: Chunk and graph ids preserve existing deterministic formats or have reviewed migration rules.
Repeated inputs produce identical ids across ingestion and enrichment.
test_plan: Shared stable-id tests for prefix format, separator handling, truncation, and repeatability.
dependencies: P1.1 if id helpers are exposed through shared records; otherwise P0
risks: Any id format change may break durable references, graph relations, or existing fixtures.

items.title: Generic Repository Hook and Persistence Wrapper
items.phase: Phase 1 - Shared Foundation Contracts
items.task: Standardize duck-typed save/log/error repository hooks for absent, partial, in-memory, and durable repository implementations.
acceptance_criteria: Optional repository behavior is consistent when hooks are missing.
Partial repository implementations do not crash successful operations unless current behavior requires failure.
Hook helper keeps emitted telemetry compatible with current modules.
test_plan: Generic repository-save helper behavior with absent and partially implemented methods.
Common repository hook tests across planning, ranking, validation, synthesis, feedback, and evaluation.
dependencies: P1.1 recommended for shared result serialization
risks: Duck-typed behavior may hide repository integration mistakes if helper is too permissive.

items.title: Partition Outcome, Telemetry, and Operation Builders
items.phase: Phase 1 - Shared Foundation Contracts
items.task: Build common helpers for logs, error envelopes, operation results, fallback actions, retryability, correlation ids, output references, and policy mutation details.
acceptance_criteria: Event names, fallback actions, retry counts, severities, and output references remain stable where tests assert them.
Feedback/evaluation success and error logs preserve `policy_mutation=false` details.
Storage adapter operation results preserve health/unavailable/degraded semantics.
test_plan: Cross-partition golden telemetry tests for event_name, fallback_action, retry_count, output_reference, and severity.
Operation helper golden tests for feedback/evaluation event payloads.
Common adapter template parity tests across durable/vector/Qdrant/Neo4j.
risks: Telemetry unification has high blast radius across most partitions.

items.title: Shared Trace and Provenance Extraction
items.phase: Phase 2 - Evidence, Provenance, Access, and Claims
items.task: Generalize evidence/source/document/chunk/citation/claim/validation id collection and unique helper behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Feedback and evaluation traces extract identical provenance from the same answer context.
Append-only reference records keep existing fields and ordering guarantees where present.
test_plan: Provenance extraction parity tests between feedback and evaluation traces.
risks: Trace reference ordering or deduplication changes may alter review workflows.

items.title: Candidate Hydration Contract
items.phase: Phase 2 - Evidence, Provenance, Access, and Claims
items.task: Define one candidate/evidence payload hydration contract for vector, keyword, graph, Qdrant, and Neo4j flows.
acceptance_criteria: Local index hits, graph hits, Qdrant payloads, and Neo4j payloads map to equivalent evidence fields.
Source metadata and citation fields are available consistently to downstream ranking, validation, and synthesis.
test_plan: Unified hydration tests for local index, graph, Qdrant, and Neo4j payloads.
risks: Backend payload differences may require explicit optional fields rather than forced uniformity.

items.title: Central Access Metadata Policy
items.phase: Phase 2 - Evidence, Provenance, Access, and Claims
items.task: Generalize access metadata checks and citation approval rules into a fail-closed evidence policy.
acceptance_criteria: Source, document, and chunk denial precedence is preserved.
Validation usable-evidence and synthesis approved-evidence rules produce parity for citation eligibility.
Retrieval filtering and backend hit payloads use the same policy surface.
test_plan: Central access evaluator tests preserving source/document/chunk denial precedence.
Citation policy parity tests between validation approval and synthesis usage.
risks: Access-control drift can cause leakage; this phase should be reviewed before broad rollout.

items.title: Claim Lifecycle Service Boundary
items.phase: Phase 2 - Evidence, Provenance, Access, and Claims
items.task: Define the lifecycle boundary for claim creation, citation attachment, support validation, and final answer replacement.
acceptance_criteria: Synthesis-created claims, validation support checks, and planning claim mutations are coordinated through one contract.
Existing answer record and support status behavior is preserved.
test_plan: Claim lifecycle tests for creation, citation attach, validation update, and final answer replacement.
risks: Claim mutation timing may affect planner repair-loop behavior.

items.title: Generic In-Memory Repository Primitives
items.phase: Phase 3 - Repository, Persistence, Graph, and Index Primitives
items.task: Generalize save/get/id-keyed dictionary patterns and log/error append behavior for in-memory repositories.
acceptance_criteria: Unknown ids, seeded records, insertion order, and relation append behavior remain deterministic.
Existing source and ingestion repository APIs remain available.
test_plan: Repository contract tests for unknown ids, insertion order, seeded records, and relation append behavior.
risks: Shared primitives must not couple source registry and ingestion domain behavior too tightly.

items.title: Record Save and Snapshot Table
items.phase: Phase 3 - Repository, Persistence, Graph, and Index Primitives
items.task: Convert repeated `save_*` id-field/store/write and snapshot routines into a table-driven record registry.
acceptance_criteria: Every record type preserves its id/store mapping.
In-memory and durable snapshot behavior remain equivalent.
JSON persistence shape remains compatible unless explicitly reviewed.
test_plan: Generic save/snapshot table tests preserving id/store mappings for every record type.
dependencies: P3.1 helpful but not mandatory; P1.1 recommended
risks: Durable serialization changes could affect existing JSON/JSONL persistence files.

items.title: Graph Index Abstraction
items.phase: Phase 3 - Repository, Persistence, Graph, and Index Primitives
items.task: Encapsulate graph relation/entity/chunk reverse indexes for commit, rebuild, verification, durable reload, and traversal.
acceptance_criteria: Graph commit and rebuild produce equivalent indexes before and after durable reload.
Retrieval traversal uses the abstraction rather than manipulating reverse indexes directly.
test_plan: Graph index abstraction tests for rebuild, verify, traversal, and durable reload equivalence.
risks: Index abstraction may need careful naming to avoid hiding graph traversal diagnostics.

items.title: Generic Index Commit Pipeline
items.phase: Phase 3 - Repository, Persistence, Graph, and Index Primitives
items.task: Generalize vector and sparse commit flow: generation, skip tracking, repository storage, chunk pointer updates, degraded logs, and result assembly.
acceptance_criteria: Vector and sparse commits keep identical result/log semantics to current behavior.
Chunk pointer updates remain mode-specific where required.
test_plan: Shared index commit tests proving identical logs/results for vector and sparse modes.
risks: Over-abstracting vector and sparse differences could reduce clarity in index diagnostics.

items.title: Text Normalization and Term Extraction Surface
items.phase: Phase 4 - Normalization, Freshness, and Scoring
items.task: Share alias/query normalization, tokenization, term extraction, phrase handling, and identifier normalization for search and graph lookup paths.
acceptance_criteria: Keyword, vector, and graph lookup paths normalize comparable inputs consistently.
Existing query and alias behavior remains covered by parity tests.
test_plan: Shared normalization parity tests across keyword, vector, and graph lookup paths.
risks: Normalization changes may affect ranking order and graph recall.

items.title: Freshness and Date Parsing Utilities
items.phase: Phase 4 - Normalization, Freshness, and Scoring
items.task: Generalize refresh interval parsing, first-date extraction, as-of-date fallback, published/retrieved/document metadata resolution, and staleness scoring inputs.
acceptance_criteria: Date fallback order is explicit and tested for evidence, chunk, document, retrieved_at, and missing-date cases.
Source freshness policy and downstream evidence freshness use compatible helpers.
test_plan: Focused duration parsing, default refresh intervals, stale transitions, and freshness fallback-order tests.
Date resolver tests for evidence, chunk, document, retrieved_at, and missing-date fallback order.
dependencies: P4.1 optional; P1.1 for date serialization
risks: Changed fallback order could affect ranking, validation, and synthesis decisions.

items.title: Shared Evidence Quality and Scoring Utilities
items.phase: Phase 4 - Normalization, Freshness, and Scoring
items.task: Share tokenization, stopword policy, clamping, reliability scoring, retrieval-score selection, freshness scoring, and normalization.
acceptance_criteria: Ranking, validation, and synthesis produce equivalent scores where the evidence says logic overlaps.
Module-specific weights remain explicit.
test_plan: Shared scoring utility parity tests across ranking/validation/synthesis.
risks: Shared scoring could make previously intentional module-specific differences less visible.

items.title: Quality Flag Append and Dedup Helper
items.phase: Phase 4 - Normalization, Freshness, and Scoring
items.task: Generalize quality flag preservation, append, deduplication, ordering, and namespacing across ingestion and enrichment.
acceptance_criteria: Existing flags are preserved.
Duplicate flags are avoided.
Combined ingestion and graph flags retain deterministic order.
test_plan: Tests for preserving existing flags, avoiding duplicates, ordering, and combining ingestion plus graph flags.
dependencies: P1.3 helpful for chunk/entity identity stability
risks: Flag ordering may be externally visible in tests or review dashboards.

items.title: Content Normalizer Strategy Registry
items.phase: Phase 5 - Table-Driven Policy Surfaces
items.task: Replace JSON/CSV/HTML/default normalization branching with a strategy registry keyed by content type or document type.
acceptance_criteria: Existing JSON, CSV, HTML, and default outputs preserve title/type/metadata/quality flag behavior.
New formats can be added without expanding a single conditional branch.
test_plan: Table-driven normalization tests by content_type, title, type, metadata, flags, and failure behavior.
risks: Parser dispatch changes may affect low-dependency ingestion guarantees.

items.title: Table-Driven Planning Policy
items.phase: Phase 5 - Table-Driven Policy Surfaces
items.task: Generalize query type routing to retrieval modes, budgets, fallback actions, validations, plan reasons, and repair-loop behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Graph, multi-hop, budget override, and repair-loop cases are represented as explicit table entries.
Planner trace reasons remain reviewable.
test_plan: Graph, multi-hop, budget override, and repair-loop table cases.
risks: Planner behavior is user-facing; small routing changes can cascade through retrieval and synthesis.

items.title: Backend Health Service Descriptors
items.phase: Phase 5 - Table-Driven Policy Surfaces
items.task: Generalize env parsing and Qdrant/Neo4j strict-service blocked/health/status logic into service descriptors.
acceptance_criteria: Ready/degraded/unavailable states match current health-check behavior.
Strict-services handling remains explicit per service.
Env file parsing edge cases are covered.
test_plan: Env parsing edge cases and mocked ready/degraded/unavailable service descriptor tests.
risks: Health CLI behavior may be used by scripts and manual checks.

items.title: Failure Taxonomy Metadata Table
items.phase: Phase 5 - Table-Driven Policy Surfaces
items.task: Convert feedback category classification, task title, recommended action, validation signal, and priority hints into one metadata table.
acceptance_criteria: Every FailureCategory text signal maps to the same title/action/priority behavior as current code.
Feedback-derived improvement tasks keep current category semantics.
test_plan: Table-driven tests for every FailureCategory text signal, validation signal, title/action, and priority.
risks: Classification keyword changes may alter downstream improvement task queues.

items.title: Backend Runtime Adapter Template
items.phase: Phase 6 - Adapter, Runtime, Metrics, and Script Templates
items.task: Generalize capability checks, health status selection, unavailable handling, operation result construction, and storage error creation across backend adapters.
acceptance_criteria: Durable, vector, Qdrant, and Neo4j adapters pass parity tests for common states.
Adapter-specific capabilities remain explicit.
test_plan: Common adapter template parity tests across durable/vector/Qdrant/Neo4j.
risks: Runtime adapter changes may affect full backend smoke checks.

items.title: Optional Client Boundary Standardization
items.phase: Phase 6 - Adapter, Runtime, Metrics, and Script Templates
items.task: Standardize optional dependency/client handling, fake-client-compatible calls, exception wrapping, and payload conversion.
acceptance_criteria: Qdrant and Neo4j clients report ready, degraded, and unavailable states consistently.
Deterministic fake clients remain supported for tests.
test_plan: Optional-client ready/degraded/unavailable tests using deterministic fake clients.
risks: Optional dependency import handling must remain dependency-optional.

items.title: Shared Metrics Aggregation Utilities
items.phase: Phase 6 - Adapter, Runtime, Metrics, and Script Templates
items.task: Extract generic sum, average, rate, count, latency, cost, partition-count, event-count, and safe-rate helpers for broader observability dashboards.
acceptance_criteria: Empty, partial, and non-scalar metrics are handled consistently.
Existing evaluation batch and observability reports preserve current values.
test_plan: Aggregation helper tests for empty, partial, and non-scalar metrics.
risks: Numeric edge cases could change dashboard-ready report outputs.

items.title: PowerShell Script Common Helper
items.phase: Phase 6 - Adapter, Runtime, Metrics, and Script Templates
items.task: Generalize duplicated root/env resolution and command wiring for backend setup and test scripts.
acceptance_criteria: Setup and test scripts resolve root/env files consistently.
Existing health and smoke command wiring remains available.
test_plan: Executable script behavior tests beyond string-presence checks.
risks: Script changes need Windows PowerShell validation and should preserve developer workflow.

checks.name: classes_match_ast
checks.evidence: generalize_project.json.classes vs current AST top-level classes

checks.name: functions_match_ast
checks.evidence: generalize_project.json.functions vs current AST top-level functions and class methods

remaining_findings: Function inventory is complete for top-level functions and class methods in src/**/*.py; nested local functions are intentionally outside this inventory schema.
The artifacts are planning/review deliverables; implementation of MARACA v02 generalizations is tracked but not performed in this step.

keyword_policy.functions: Function entries are inventory records and are not individually keyword-tagged unless they are part of duplicate groups.
keyword_policy.duplicates: Every exact-body group, repeated-name group, theme candidate, agent opportunity, and summary finding carries keywords.
keyword_policy.tracker: Tracker items inherit evidence keywords through evidence_ids and summary_findings.
